title: Trimmed Swords
description: When you craft swords with a specific armor trim they will change to a trimmed variant with custom ability's.
body:
## What Does It Do?
This mod adds custom swords that can be crafted with trims. These swords have custom abilitys that you can use Ex. Giving yourself speed, strength, and fire resistance.
I do plan on updating this mod to add the rest of the trims. And possibly do pickaxes.

## Thanks For 500 Downloads!

Also, the textures for the swords are 3d models in game.

**I recommend downloading [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**

## The Swords And Their Abilitys

**Sentry:** When right clicked you shoot a high damage arrow where you are looking. Cooldown: 30s

**Vex:** When right clicked you heal yourself back to full health. Cooldown: 5m

**Wild:** When right clicked you give yourself speed 5. Cooldown: 2m Length of effect: 10s

**Coast:** When right clicked you give yourself dolphins grace. Cooldown: 2m Length of effect: 30s

**Wayfinder:** When right clicked you give every player glowing. Cooldown: 3m Length of effect: 30s

**Ward:** When right clicked you give other players darkness and blindness. Cooldown: 2m Length of effect: 15s

**Rib:** When right clicked you give yourself strength, speed, and fire resistance. Cooldown: 5m Length of effect: 3m

**Eye:** When right clicked you shoot a fireball where your looking. Cooldown: 60s

**Spire:** When right clicked you give yourself levitation. Cooldown: 60s Length of effect: 15s

**Bolt:** When right clicked you give yourself haste. Cooldown: 2m Length of effect: 15s

**Flow:** When right clicked you summon a bunch of windcharges below you that when hit will shoot you into the air. Cooldown: 30s

## Other Stuff Included

**Upgrader:** Used to upgrade swords.

**Reinforced Iron:** Used to make sword template into a reinforced sword.

**Sword Template:** The start of all of the crafting.

**Anti Trimmed & Trimmed Potion:** Potions that can help or hurt you.

![Recipe Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/596f78db4069eb6e16576336759403b3e0aa46a0_0.webp)
